Here are some practical tips to improve your phone's battery life:

## Quick Wins
- **Lower screen brightness** or enable auto-brightness
- **Reduce screen timeout** to a shorter interval
- **Turn off Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or GPS** when not in use

## Settings to Check
- **Battery saver mode** - enable it manually or set it to trigger automatically
- **Background app refresh** - limit which apps can run in the background
- **Push notifications** - reduce how often apps fetch new data

## Apps & Usage
- Check your **battery usage stats** to identify drain culprits
- Close apps you're not using
- Reduce **location services** to "while using" instead of always

## Other Factors
- **Keep your phone cool** - heat degrades battery health
- Avoid letting it drain to 0% frequently
- Try to keep charge between **20-80%** for long-term battery health

## If Problems Persist
- Check your **battery health** in settings (iPhone) or a battery app (Android)
- Consider whether your battery may need **replacement** if it's an older phone
